eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 05:33 PM ON JAN 30, 2026 Effective until 05:33 PM JAN 31, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from El Paso, Texas. Missing child is Zury Talamantes, 14 year old Hispanic female last seen wearing a white shirt, navy sweater, and blue jeans. Call El Paso Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1.
